name: Tie Clasp
description: Microphone. Average listening range 600ft.

name: Electric Condenser Lavalier Mic
description: Can be hung around neck or attached to cloth. Battery operated or plugged in.

name: Broadcast Quality Tie Tack
description: High quality broadcast microphone concealed in a tie tack.

name: Keyhole and Tube Mics
description: Mics with long hollow tubes, either stiff or flexible, which can be placed in cracks, mounted on walls, or placed in keyholes.

name: Contact Mics
description: Translates vibrations into sound. Requires a sounding board such as a wall, window or device.

name: Vibration Pocket Detector
description: Detects vibrations.

name: Low Frequency Converter
description: Converts low frequency signals.

name: Frequency Equalizer
description: Controls cut off of certain frequencies and boosts others.

name: Test Transmitter
description: Basic test transmitter.

name: Additional Transducer
description: Add-on transducer component.

name: Telephone Induction Unit
description: Telephone induction surveillance unit.

name: Sound Amplifier
description: Basic sound amplifier.

name: Sound Amplifier (high quality)
description: High quality sound amplifier.

name: Commercial Wireless Mic
description: Entertainment-grade commercial wireless microphone.

name: Compact Commercial Wireless Mic
description: Compact wireless mic approximately the size of a pack of cigarettes.

name: Special Bugs
description: Come in a variety of sizes from postage stamp to martini olive type, complete with mic, transmitter and amplifier. Average range 60 feet.

name: Room Bug
description: Taps into the wall current (needs capacitor). Range: 1200ft. Homemade cost $100, police version $500.

name: Transmitter (typical)
description: Standard typical transmitter.

name: Transmitter (quality crystal)
description: High quality crystal transmitter.

name: Bumper Beeper
description: Attaches to automobile bumper via magnetized clip. Antenna can be permanently mounted or detachable. Transmits a signal that can be followed up to five miles away (battery powered). Receiver can locate beeper by intensity/strength of signal. Price includes receiver.

name: Dash Beeper
description: Identical in operation/function to the bumper beeper but can be concealed in the dashboard inside the car.

name: Mini (spy) Beeper
description: Same basic function as bumper beeper but about the size of a half dollar and half an inch thick. Can be slipped into pockets, briefcases, bags, purses, vehicles (although will rattle around), etc. Range approximately two mile maximum radius.

name: Field Strength Meter
description: Bug detector. Picks up radio signals and registers them.

name: Broadband Receiver
description: Bug detector. Causes a feedback and makes a howl when near a transmitter.

name: Drop in Cartridge
description: Telephone bug. Battery powered, fits in the telephone receiver.

name: Room Bug Mini-Transmitter
description: Telephone bug. Looks like a telephone jack, battery operated.

name: Telephone Line Transmitter
description: Telephone bug. Taps right into telephone line and power, needs no batteries, will run indefinitely. A little larger box than the mini-transmitter.

name: Night Sight Goggles
description: Night vision optic system. Image intensifier (passive), relies on ambient light which is electronically amplified to give a visible picture. Range: 1600ft. Weight: 1.5lbs.

name: Night Sight Binoculars
description: Night vision optic system. Image intensifier (passive), relies on ambient light which is electronically amplified to give a visible picture. Range: 1600ft. Weight: 4lbs.

name: Night Sight Monocular Eye Piece
description: Night vision optic system. Image intensifier (passive), relies on ambient light. Range: 1600ft.

name: Night Sight Weapon Sight
description: Night vision optic system for weapons. Image intensifier (passive), relies on ambient light. Range: 1600ft.

name: Night Sight Pocket Night Viewer
description: Night vision pocket viewer. Image intensifier (passive). Range: 800ft.

name: Night Sight Large Tri-Pod Mount
description: Large tri-pod mounted night vision unit. Range: 1600ft. Weight: 30lbs.

name: Infrared Goggles
description: Infrared optic system. Relays on a source of infrared light (pencil thin beam) projected from the sight or goggle to illuminate its target. View limited to about 6 square feet. Range: 1200ft.

name: Infrared Binoculars
description: Infrared optic system. Relays on a source of infrared light projected from the sight or goggle to illuminate its target. Range: 1200ft.

name: Infrared Monocular Eye Piece
description: Infrared optic system. Relays on a source of infrared light projected from the sight or goggle. Range: 1200ft.

name: Infrared Weapon Sight
description: Infrared optic weapon sight. Range: 1200ft.

name: Thermo-Imager Goggles
description: Converts infrared radiation of warm objects into a visible image. Electrically cooled, runs from nickel cadmium batteries (rechargeable), 8 hour running life. Sees in darkness, shadows and through smoke. Range: 1600ft.

name: Thermo-Imager Binoculars
description: Converts infrared radiation of warm objects into a visible image. Electrically cooled, 8 hour battery life. Range: 1600ft.

name: Thermo-Imager Monocular Eye Piece
description: Converts infrared radiation of warm objects into a visible image. Electrically cooled, 8 hour battery life. Range: 1600ft.

name: Thermo-Imager Weapon Sight
description: Converts infrared radiation of warm objects into a visible image. Electrically cooled, 8 hour battery life. Range: 1600ft.

name: Binoculars (2000ft, Best Magnification)
description: Binoculars and telescopic sight. Best magnification. Range: 2000ft.

name: Binoculars (1600ft, Medium Magnification)
description: Binoculars and telescopic sight. Medium magnification. Range: 1600ft.

name: Binoculars (1600ft, Low Magnification)
description: Binoculars and telescopic sight. Low magnification. Range: 1600ft.

name: Weapon Sight (Best Magnification)
description: Telescopic weapon sight. Best magnification.

name: Weapon Sight (Medium Magnification)
description: Telescopic weapon sight. Medium magnification.

name: Weapon Sight (Low Magnification)
description: Telescopic weapon sight. Low magnification.

name: Illuminating Peglight
description: Designed for military use as markers for routes and mine fields. Emits beta light which emits no heat and gives no infrared emissions. Can be seen from distances up to 70 feet.

name: Portable Explosives Detector
description: Responds to vapor from explosives such as dynamite, gelignite, T.N.T., and others. An alarm lamp lights up when an explosive is detected. Range: 3.5 feet.

name: Letter Bomb Detector
description: Electronic instrument that examines letters in minutes with an audio alarm that sounds when electrically conductive material is detected.

name: Radar Signal Detector (military)
description: Mini-radar receiver that can fit in one hand. Small, lightweight, easy to conceal. Recently developed for the U.S. Army. Effective range: 80 feet, 4 miles maximum.

name: Commercial Radar Detector
description: Also known as the Fuzz Buster. Used for detecting police radar scans.

name: Motion Detector (commercial)
description: Detects movement within the field. Range: 120 square feet.

name: Ground Sensor System
description: Uses seismic and passive infrared sensors to detect vehicles, men, direction and numbers. Control unit with map display, monitor and a dozen sensor units. Range: Between transmitter 600 feet, and can register activity up to 4 miles away.

name: Microwave Fence
description: Units emit an invisible microwave curtain or fence that will light up or buzz quietly once an intruder breaches its curtain. Control units, eight transmitters and receivers. Range: Between transmitters 600 feet, registers activity up to 4 miles away.

name: Psychological Stress Evaluator
description: Used by law enforcement agencies, private investigators, some corporations, clinics and law firms. Functions like a polygraph but measures and records stress and anxiety without attaching sensors to the subject by monitoring the voice quality. Includes a tape recorder.

name: Polygraph Stress Machine
description: Sensors attached to skin which monitor and record glandular changes including sweat.

name: Polygraph Stress Monitor (superior quality)
description: Sensors attached to skin and body which record breathing, heart rate/beat, blood pressure, and skin resistance. All three functions fed into a chart recorder with three pens to mark results.

name: 35mm Camera
description: Standard 35mm still camera.

name: Extra Lens 28mm F28
description: 28mm, F28 camera lens.

name: Extra Lens 135mm F35
description: 135mm, F35 camera lens.

name: Flash (average)
description: Average camera flash unit.

name: 35mm Film Black and White (36 exposures)
description: Black and white 35mm film, 36 exposure roll.

name: 35mm Film Color (36 exposures)
description: Color 35mm film, 36 exposure roll.

name: Super 8mm Sound Movie Camera
description: Super 8mm sound movie camera.

name: Super 8mm Film
description: Approximately 15 minutes of running time.

name: Slide Projector
description: Standard slide projector.

name: Projection Screen
description: Standard projection screen.

name: Video System
description: Includes video recorder, tuner and timer.

name: Color Camera with Mike
description: Color video camera with built-in microphone.

name: Video Tape Cassette
description: Standard video tape cassette.

name: Telescope
description: Zoom 15-60X power, 1000-4000mm. Can be attached to 35mm camera.

name: 35mm Camera Adapter
description: Adapter for attaching 35mm camera to telescope.

name: Basic Computer
description: 48k memory and keyboard.

name: Monitor (Black and White)
description: Black and white T.V. monitor for data display.

name: Color Monitor
description: Color computer monitor.

name: Hard Copy Printer
description: Computer printer for hard copy output.

name: Modem
description: Device for sending and receiving data.

name: Basic Phone
description: Standard telephone.

name: Telephone Answering Machine
description: Standard telephone answering machine.

name: Tape Recorder (pocket sized)
description: Pocket sized tape recorder. 30 to 60 minute recording time.

name: Walkie-Talkie (commercial)
description: Commercial walkie-talkie. Range: 1 mile. Price per pair.

name: Walkie-Talkie (police/military)
description: Police and military grade walkie-talkie. Range: 2 miles.

name: Field Radio
description: Field radio. Range: 25 miles.

name: C.B. Radio
description: Citizens Band radio. Range: 2 miles.

name: Police Band Scanner
description: Scans police radio bands. Range: 25 miles.

name: T-Shirt (cotton)
description: Basic cotton t-shirt.

name: Shirt (short sleeve)
description: Short sleeve shirt.

name: Shirt (long sleeve)
description: Long sleeve shirt.

name: Pants (work)
description: Work pants.

name: Tennis Shoes
description: Standard tennis shoes.

name: Shoes (leather)
description: Leather shoes.

name: Boots (leather)
description: Leather boots.

name: Speed Suit (coveralls)
description: Speed suit style coveralls.

name: Coveralls (cotton)
description: Cotton coveralls.

name: Coveralls (work)
description: Work coveralls.

name: Coveralls (disposable)
description: Disposable coveralls.

name: Lab Coat (disposable)
description: Disposable lab coat.

name: Coveralls (insulated)
description: Coveralls that insulate against cold.

name: Hard Hat
description: Maximum electrical impact resistance.

name: Flight Jacket
description: Standard flight jacket.

name: Polar Coat
description: Can withstand cold and wind to -20 degrees.

name: Gloves (leather, heavy duty)
description: Heavy duty leather gloves.

name: Gloves (leather, palm only)
description: Leather palm-only gloves.

name: Gloves (leather welders)
description: Leather welding gloves.

name: Gloves (leather racing)
description: Leather racing gloves.

name: Sun Glasses (light adjusting)
description: Light adjusting sun glasses.

name: Sun Glasses (aviator)
description: Aviator style sun glasses.

name: Shooting Glasses
description: Change color and density in response to changes in light and weather. Also reduces glare and improves visibility.

name: Jet Pack
description: Speed: 80mph maximum. Duration of flight: 40 minutes maximum. S.D.C.: 100. Maximum height: 300 feet. Fuel cost: $500 per tank (40 minute flight capacity).

name: Electro-adhesive Pad
description: Hand-held device that adheres strongly to any metal surface by passing a small current through two metal electrodes. Used by astronauts; hand-held pads are more flexible. Includes Electro-adhesive Pad (2) and Generator/hip and hand packs (12 lbs). Can hold up to 1000 lbs. Works only on metal.

name: Electro-adhesive Pad (shoe form)
description: Shoe-form version of the electro-adhesive pad. Can hold up to 1000 lbs. Works only on metal.

name: Space Suit (complete)
description: Self-contained environmental suit, insulated, heat and cold shielded, with oxygen and life support system.

name: The Pick (lock pick)
description: Small thin steel tool ending in a slight upward curve or special tip configuration. Used to raise the pins of the lock. Good range of pick thickness is .025-.035. Available through locksmiths and locksmith suppliers. NOTE: Smiths and suppliers will not sell to anyone off the street. Price per pick, at least a dozen needed for a proper range.

name: Tension Bar
description: L-shaped tool constructed of clock spring steel. Used along with a pick to open locks by manipulating the position of the locking pins. Generally 3.5 to 4.5 inches long.

name: Car Opener
description: Window prying tool. Fairly easy to find and purchase or construct.

name: Cross Bar
description: Old standby lock/entry tool using sheer force.

name: Drill
description: Old standby entry tool using sheer force.

name: Bolt Cutters
description: Old standby tool. Good for shearing chains, cable and padlocks.

name: Key Blank
description: Used for making key impressions. Must be obtained the same way as lock picks.

name: Lock File
description: Used in lock picking and key making.

name: Automatic Lock Pick / Release Gun
description: Only sold to law enforcement agencies. Throws all pins into position at once and never damages the lock mechanism. Opens all types of locks (tumbler, spool, regular or mushroom). Street cost $1200 minimum, may cost as much as 200% more.

name: Flashlight
description: Standard police/guard flashlight.

name: Flashlight Holder
description: Holster/holder for a flashlight.

name: Chemical Spray - Small (tear gas)
description: Tear gas spray canister. 24 one-second bursts up to 10 feet.

name: Chemical Spray - Large (tear gas)
description: Tear gas spray canister. 70 one-second bursts up to 15 feet.

name: Handcuffs (nickel, heavy duty)
description: Heavy duty nickel handcuffs.

name: Night Sticks
description: High density, unbreakable plastic night sticks.

name: Holster (trouser)
description: Trouser/hip holster.

name: Holster (ankle)
description: Ankle holster.

name: Holster (shoulder)
description: Shoulder holster.

name: Hand Cuffs (novelty)
description: Novelty handcuffs. S.D.C. 40.

name: Hand Cuffs (police)
description: Police grade handcuffs. S.D.C. 80.

name: Sap Glove
description: Six ounces of powdered lead built into each glove just above the knuckles, adding weight and strength to the force of one's blow. +2 to damage. Available from most security guard suppliers.

name: Fibre Glass Night Stick
description: Fibre glass night stick. Does 1D6 damage.

name: Steel Rod Encased Night Stick
description: Steel rod encased night stick. Does 1D6 damage.

name: Portable Telephone Scrambler
description: Converts normal speech into unintelligible gibberish over the telephone line and converts received gibberish into clear speech. 25 different scrambling codes. Fully transistorized, can be used on any conventional phone. Comes with impact resistance carrying case.

name: Bullet Resistant Attache Case
description: Bullet resistant attache case. A.R. 15, S.D.C. 140.

name: Courier Briefcase
description: Reinforced courier briefcase. A.R. 11, S.D.C. 90.

name: Acoustic Noise Generator
description: Muffles conversations and distorts bugging systems by 30%.

name: Organic Acid I
description: Affects only organic substances. Does 2D6 damage each melee for a total of four melees. Not a common household item; must be acquired from a chemical supplier, industry or illegal outlet. Price per 1/2 gallon.

name: Organic Acid II (Concentrated)
description: Does 4D6 damage to all other substances. Not a common household item; must be acquired from a chemical supplier, industry or illegal outlet. Price per 1/2 gallon.

name: Cleanser Acid
description: Acid cleanser. Does 1D8 damage per melee for a total of four melees. 1D8 damage per melee to organics and plastics. Price per 1/2 gallon.

name: Metal Dissolver
description: Industrial acid. Does 4D6 damage per melee for a total of four melees. Does 1D8 damage per melee for total of four melees to organics and plastics. Price per 1/2 gallon.

name: Dynamite
description: Nitroglycerin-based explosive widely used in mining and road construction. Can be detonated with blasting caps, fuses and timing devices. Damage one stick: 5-40 to 12 sq. feet, 1-8 for an additional 20 feet. Black market price per stick. Availability: 45%.

name: Detonation Caps/Fuses
description: Used to detonate explosives. Black market price each. Availability: 32%.

name: Plastic Explosive
description: Very localized blast explosive that can be molded and formed like putty. Inert until activated by an electrical blasting cap. Damage: 2 ounces equals one stick of dynamite. Black market price per 2oz. Availability: 19%.

name: Gelatin Explosive
description: Very localized blast explosive that can be molded and formed like putty. Inert until activated by an electrical blasting cap. Damage: 2 ounces equals one stick of dynamite. Black market price per ounce. Availability: 18%.

name: Liquid Nitroglycerin
description: Extremely dangerous, unstable chemical explosive concentrate. A severe jar, jerk or bump can cause it to detonate, 30% chance. Damage: one ounce equals four sticks of dynamite. Black market price per ounce. Availability: 20%.

name: Mortar Shells
description: Military mortar ammunition. Black market price each. Availability: 10%.

name: Exploding Hand Grenade
description: Effective range thrown: 60-80 feet, max range 160 feet. Damage: 5-30 to a 15 sq. foot area, 1-6 for an additional 20 sq. feet. Black market cost $60 each. Availability: 30%.

name: Fragmentation Grenade
description: Specifically designed to hurl hundreds of tiny fragments to inflict greater damage. Damage: 6-36 to a 20 sq. foot area, 2-12 for an additional 20 sq. feet. Black market cost $60 each.

name: White Phosphorous Grenade
description: Ignites/flames on contact with air, setting the area ablaze. Damage: 3D6 per melee aflame, affects a 15 sq. foot area. Burns for 2D4 melees.

name: Smoke Grenade
description: Creates a smoke screen, 30 sq. foot area. Can come in a variety of colors for signalling and target designation. Black market cost $30 each. Availability: 40%.

name: Rifle Launched Grenade
description: Basically does the same damage as corresponding hand grenades but can be fired from a rifle. Approximate rifle range: 800-900 feet. Illuminating flares can also be fired from rifles, dropping down and lighting up a 90 sq. foot area. Duration: 40-60 seconds. Black market cost $80 each. Availability: 20%.

name: Homemade Bomb (Molotov Cocktail)
description: A bottle filled with gasoline with a rag stuffed in it. The rag is lit and the bottle thrown, shattering on impact and spraying ignited gasoline. If the bottle does not shatter on impact it will explode from pressure within a minute or two. Damage: 2-12 per melee until the flame is put out, effects approximately 12 sq. feet. Effective range thrown: 40 feet.
